title: Bitter Brazilian Tamarind Crumble
description: This adventurous dessert features tender tamarind balls simmered in a creamy dairy-free sauce and served with crunchy crumbles.

ingredients.name: 3 cups crushed cornstarch cookies or digestive biscuits

instructions: Blend avocados with coconut milk until smooth.
Grate tamarind seeds into a bowl and add the blended avocado mixture. Stir well to extract all liquid from the avocados.
Simmer on medium heat until thickened, about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Pour half of the cooked tamarind mixture into a saucepan; top with sugar substitute (if using). Cook until caramelized and syrupy, about 10-12 minutes. Remove from heat.
In another bowl, mix crushed cookies or biscuits with raw sugar substitute (if using), stirring until well coated. Transfer half of the cookie mixture to a baking dish.
Pour remaining tamarind sauce over crumbles in baking dish, spreading evenly.
Bake at 350°F for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on top.
Serve warm with additional caramelized sauce drizzled over the crumble layer.
